items.title: LeBron to compete in 24th NBA season elsewhere with Lakers return ruled out
items.summary: LeBron James will play a record-extending 24th NBA season with a new team after it was confirmed he would not be returning to the Los Angeles Lakers.

items.title: Lampard signs new Coventry deal after summer interest
items.summary: Frank Lampard has signed a new contract as Coventry City head coach until 2029.

items.title: All done deals in June 2026
items.summary: Check out the significant signings and departures in the Premier League, Scottish Premiership, EFL and Women's Super League.

items.title: Enzo Maresca mysteriously deletes Chelsea apology post after Blues released furious statement blasting new Man City boss
items.summary: ENZO MARESCA has mysteriously deleted his apology post to Chelsea on social media. The post uploaded on Instagram confirmed that he pushed to quit the club last season. Maresca, 46, has now been announced as the new Manchester City manager and Pep Guardiola's successor. The Cityzens have paid £17mil

items.title: Haaland the late hero as Norway knock out resilient Ivory Coast
items.summary: Manchester City striker Erling Haaland scores a late winner as Norway beat Ivory Coast 2-1 to book their place in the last 16 in the 2026 World Cup.

items.title: Haaland scores late winner to set up Norway vs Brazil
items.summary: Erling Haaland scored an 86th-minute winner to send Norway to a dramatic 2-1 win over Ivory Coast - and set up a mouth-watering World Cup last-16 clash with Brazil.

items.title: Quansah and James miss England training as right-back problems mount
items.summary: Jarell Quansah and Reece James miss training as England's right-back issues mount before their World Cup last-32 match against DR Congo on Wednesday.

items.title: 'A moment of real quality' - Nusa's sensational strike puts Norway ahead
items.summary: Norway take the lead in their round of 32 tie against Ivory Coast after a brilliant strike from forward Antonio Nusa.

items.title: Erling Haaland fires Norway into last 16 with dramatic winner against Côte d’Ivoire
items.summary: Decision vindicated. The Norway coach, Ståle Solbakken, had taken a major gamble in resting almost his entire side in the final group game against France , drawing stiff criticism, not least from those who had paid hundreds of dollars to witness a showdown between Erling Haaland and Kylian Mbappé. items.summary: DANNY MURPHY has ruined Ivory Coast's World Cup clash with Norway for BBC viewers with his depressing cat story. items.summary: COMETH the hour, cometh the big man. Erling Haaland did not even touch the ball with his feet in the opening quarter of the game. items.title: Four Premier League sides fined by UEFA for breaches of financial rules
items.summary: Aston Villa, Chelsea, Newcastle United and Nottingham Forest have all been fined by UEFA for breaching financial sustainability regulations.

items.title: Brighton sign Leeds defender Struijk for about £20m
items.summary: Brighton sign Leeds United defender Pascal Struijk for an undisclosed fee understood to be about £20m.

items.title: Plot to intimidate Man Utd legend revealed as ‘gangsters threatened he would “go in a cemetery” during football row’
items.summary: A PLOT to intimidate a Manchester United legend has been revealed in a slew of secret messages that suggest a football chief wanted to scare the player into silence. items.title: World Cup penalty misses - is this the end of the stutter?
items.summary: The stutter. Like it or loathe it, it's a technique that has been increasingly adopted by penalty takers since the time of Pele in the 1960s. But after some faltering spot-kicks at this World Cup - might it be time up for one of football's most polarising tricks?

items.title: England fans' behaviour 'excellent' at World Cup
items.summary: England supporters in the United States are praised for their "excellent" behaviour during the group stage of the World Cup, but domestic incidents are up on recent tournaments.

items.title: 'Goal of the tournament' - Amad's brilliant equaliser for Ivory Coast
items.summary: Amad Diallo scores a "goal of the tournament" contender to equalise for Ivory Coast against Norway in their last-32 match.

items.title: Ecuador make Mexico fans hotel noise complaint
items.summary: Ecuador make a complaint to World Cup organisers over noisy local fans outside their team hotel before their last-32 match against co-hosts Mexico.

items.title: Why England should not be scared of World Cup shootouts as penalty expert breaks down Euro 2024 ‘buddy system’
items.summary: A PENALTY shootout expert has insisted that England should not be worried if their World Cup dream relies on spot-kicks.
